description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Active Auction House allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) catid, (2) SortDir, or (3) Sortby parameter to default.asp, (4) itemID parameter to ItemInfo.asp, or (5) Email field to sendpassword.asp.
